summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Real-World Applications
summary_sections.content_html:
Real-World Applications

Example: Which example demonstrates the practical relevance of Electromagnetic Spectrum?

This is a real-world application of Electromagnetic Spectrum.

summary_sections.title: Special Topics
summary_sections.content_html:
Important Concepts

Which term is described by: "c = fλ = 3 × 10⁸ m/s in vacuum; all EM waves travel at the same speed regardless of frequency"

This description refers to "EM wave speed".

Which term is described by: "E = hf = hc/λ; h = 6.63 × 10⁻³⁴ J·s (Planck's constant); higher frequency = higher energy per photon"

This description refers to "Photon energy".
